label: SGD, momentum & stochastic optimization

node.label: SGD, momentum & stochastic optimization
node.definition: Stochastic gradient descent estimates gradients from minibatches; momentum and related variants accumulate update direction to reduce noise and accelerate consistent descent.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, SGD, momentum & stochastic optimization is modeled as depending on Optimization theory, Calculus & automatic differentiation theory and feeding downstream nodes such as Adam, Adafactor & adaptive optimizers.
examples: atlas downstream link to Adam, Adafactor & adaptive optimizers
limitations: Results are sensitive to data quality, hyperparameters, compute budget, random variation, and evaluation contamination. Its direct dependencies include Optimization theory, Calculus & automatic differentiation theory.
